content.problemStatement:
Write a C++ program to define a class named Rectangle with data members length and width.Include the following member functions:


getData() to accept length and width from the user.
area() to calculate and display the area of the rectangle.
Create an object in the main() function and call the functions.

code.Python3:
# Function to compute sum of array elements
def solve():
    n = int(input())              # number of elements
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))  # array elements
    print(sum(arr))               # print sum of elements

# Run the function
if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
